## What changed

Describe the product or technical change.

## Why

Explain the user problem or engineering reason.

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed lib test`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Android smoke test
- [ ] iOS smoke test when applicable

## Product checks

- [ ] All visible text is localized
- [ ] RTL layout was considered
- [ ] Analytics/privacy impact was reviewed
- [ ] No secrets or personal data were committed

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for UI changes.
